coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should Register new patients using national ID and contact details.

coverage_by_requirement.original_requirement: The system should meet accessibility requirements.
The system should support Arabic and English UI.
The system should respond within two seconds for all standard operations.

committee_brief.domain_inference: Likely domain: hospital operations and clinical workflow management.
committee_brief.scope_assessment: Scope includes 5 functional task(s) and 4 non-functional task(s); 0 task(s) sit outside the confirmed baseline because they are optional or low-confidence.
assumption_log: Dependency sequencing was inferred for 5 task(s) to produce an executable implementation order beyond the raw prose order.
committee_brief.confidence_signal: Planning confidence is high: no low-confidence tasks were detected in the current plan.
committee_brief.graph_summary: 9 requirements -> 9 atomic tasks across 4 delivery sprints. Critical delivery path: T006 -> T001 -> T002 -> T003 (4 hops, ~10 story points, estimated 5 weeks with a 2-person team). Coordination hotspot: Enforce accessibility requirements blocks 5 downstream tasks and should be closed by Sprint 1. Parallel execution opportunity: 4 tasks can start immediately in Sprint 1. Effort breakdown: 236 estimated hours | FR: 100h | NFR: 136h.
